# Part 1: Pangrams (All Letters)
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs!
Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow.
# Purpose: Pangrams include every letter of the alphabet, displaying glyph shapes and balance for all lowercase and uppercase characters[web:12][web:15].

# Part 2: Numerals
0123456789
# Purpose: Examines numeric design, alignment, and spacing.

# Part 3: Accented Latin Characters
脌脕脗脙脛脜 脝脟脠脡脢脣 脤脥脦脧 脩脪脫脭脮脰 脴脵脷脹脺 脻 鸥
脿谩芒茫盲氓 忙莽猫茅锚毛 矛铆卯茂 帽貌贸
